query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_grupos_duplicados,
  SUM(total_registros - 1) as total_registros_a_remover,
  SUM(total_registros) as total_registros_duplicados
FROM (
  SELECT 
    i.leadId,
    i.corretorId,
    i.tipo,
    DATE(i.createdAt) as data,
    COUNT(*) as total_registros
  FROM interacoes i
  WHERE DATE(i.createdAt) >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
  GROUP BY i.leadId, i.corretorId, i.tipo, DATE(i.createdAt)
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, MIN(i.createdAt), MAX(i.createdAt)) < 60
) as duplicados;

  FROM interacoes i
